content.en:
Purple World.

After Ye Tian went deeper, the purple light entered his body and was refined by him one by one, and the degree of erosion was almost negligible.

In the past, although Ye Tian had not entered the inner perimeter of the purple light world, he was able to roughly estimate the time he could stay according to the degree of purple light erosion.

Before, he estimated that he could only stay in this position for a month, but now he feels that he will not be a problem even if he stays for decades.

"Having the purple light talent and the purple armor talent almost made me ignore the erosion of purple light!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he remembered his purpose this time, and he calmed down and carefully searched for various resources.

"There's a rich purple light fluctuation over there!"

Ye Tian felt it and said in surprise.

Purple light fluctuations are difficult to sense, and those Heavenly Monarchs who were eroded and fallen by purple light were unable to sense purple light fluctuations, so they entered the purple light abnormal area and were eroded by the terrible purple light and died.

But the place where the purple light is rich is both a crisis and an opportunity, because treasures can often be born there.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew in that direction, and soon came to a forest, and his eyes were fixed on a giant tree somewhere in the forest.

In Ye Tian's sense, the purple light within a radius of one mile of this giant tree was very rich, and the others were ten times more intense than the surrounding area.

Soon, Ye Tian saw an elixir, which took the appearance of ginseng, purple all over, and was hidden thirty meters below the ground of the giant tree.

Ye Tian used the Great God Arithmetic to calculate for himself, and after confirming that there was no danger, he flew over, and used the purple armor talent to shake the purple light erosion, and took out the purple ginseng.

Then, Ye Tian left this area.

"This elixir is extraordinary, and the mild purple light energy contained in it is very rich!"

Ye Tian said happily.

Usually, he uses purple light to refine his body, and ninety percent of the energy is eroding his physical body, and he can only use that one percent of the energy, and the refining effect is not very good.

But if he uses this elixir to refine his body, he can use at least fifty percent of his energy, plus the energy of the elixir is full, he can refine it for a long time.

It can be said that this elixir is equivalent to what he needed to cultivate for thousands of years before.

And it would take him a day at most to refine this elixir.

One day is worth a thousand years of penance, how fast is such a cultivation speed!

"I have a god-level purple light talent and a god-level purple armor talent, I can sense the intensity of purple light, and I can completely see where there are treasures such as elixir spirit grass, and the speed of collecting treasures is far beyond others, the only thing I am worried about is my own safety. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, he was very careful to collect all kinds of elixirs and spiritual grasses, and he was not greedy, and he did not enter the core area at all, although he also encountered some purple spirit gold insects during the period, but relying on the time and space transfer technique and constant light supernatural powers, he easily got rid of those purple spirit gold insects.

However, he still encountered danger several times, and encountered the powerful Purple Spirit Golden Worm, and he almost couldn't escape.

In three months, Ye Tian had collected a total of 35 kinds of elixir spirit grasses, and the number was different, and their value was unimaginable.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of the Purple Light World, ready to cultivate for a while.

Greed represents danger, if he continues to stay in the purple light world, he can indeed get more treasure resources, but he may also encounter danger and die with a whimper.

For the sake of safety, Ye Tian could only come out of the purple light world.

Outside the Purple Light World, Ye Tian began to cultivate at the temporary residence of the Void Heaven Temple.

In the retreat room, Ye Tian took out a strain of elixir spirit grass, urged the Xuanxuan Secret with all his strength, and began to refine its purple light energy.

Time passed day by day.

More than three months had passed in the blink of an eye, and Ye Tian had already finished refining all those elixirs and spirit grasses.

"In more than three months, 35 kinds of elixir spirit herbs, almost seventy or eighty plants, all of them have been refined, and I have finally advanced my Xuanxuan Jue to the seventh layer of the consummation realm, and my strength has improved again, but I still haven't been able to break the shackles of the eight-star peak god general and the nine-star god general!"

Ye Tian was a little regretful, but he also knew how big the gap between the eight-star peak god general and the nine-star god general was.

A nine-star early stage god general can easily kill an eight-star peak god general in seconds, even if dozens of eight-star peak god generals besiege a nine-star early stage god general together, they can only remain undefeated and difficult to defeat.

After all, the eight-star peak god general may still have some weaknesses, but to be able to become a nine-star early stage god general, it is almost impossible to have weaknesses, invincible in attack, invincible in defense, invincible in speed, and not afraid of siege at all.

Even to a certain extent, the number of Divine Generals was completely useless to the Nine-Star Early Divine Generals.

At this time, Ye Tian was thinking about how to proceed with his cultivation in the future.

In terms of Xuanxuan Jue, he has already cultivated the seventh layer to the consummation realm, which is already the realm of the Heavenly Mandate, and if he wants to break through to the eighth layer realm, it is almost an insurmountable shackle, no less difficult than the difficulty of the great universe to transcend, and it requires a large amount of resources, which is something he can't do for the time being.

"The Xuanxuan Jue must be given up for the time being, even the purple light is difficult to refine my physical body, my physical body has now reached a limit, unless I go to transcendence, I don't even want to use the Xuanxuan Jue to break through for the time being. The potential of the Void Heaven Dao Body is still very large, but there is no way to condense the Dao pattern in a short period of time. It seems that a great supernatural power must be cultivated to the extreme level!"

Ye Tian thought.

He originally wanted to continue his retreat and make every effort to cultivate a great divine power to the extreme level, but after only one year of retreat, an astonishing news came from the Purple Light World.

There is a purple light gate in the place where the purple spirit golden worm was born, and the dense purple spirit golden worm came out of that purple light gate, and the origin of that purple light gate is very extraordinary.

It is the Gate of Innate Origin!

There are various origins in chaos, such as all kinds of innate origin things, but once the origin is strong enough to a certain extent, it will either give birth to a universe or an innate origin place.

The Innate Origin Land is outside of time and space, and only one Origin Gate can connect the Innate Origin Land, and each Innate Origin Land is different and has unique rules.

The Purple Spirit Golden Worm is a creature born in the Land of Innate Origin, and it has such a terrifying ability.

And the purple light world was caused by the erosion of the purple light leaked from the Innate Origin Land, thus transforming this world and forming such a unique environment.

The appearance of the Innate Origin Land is a big event, if it is in the chaos, it is enough to attract the attention of a group of True Ancestors, because the Innate Origin Land is a great opportunity, a great opportunity.

However, at the moment, no one dared to enter this Innate Origin Land, because the purple light eroded the flesh body was too terrifying, and the Heavenly Monarch did not dare to enter the Innate Origin Land rashly, otherwise it would be easy to fall.
